etymology.description: 中(中) (zhōng, "middle") + 國(國) (guó, "country") = 中國(中國) (Zhōngguó, "China"); 民(民) (mín, "people") shares a semantic connection with "citizenship"; 航(航) (háng, "navigation") suggests the act of navigating or flying.
etymology.interpretation: 中國(中國) (Zhōngguó, "China") represents the country; 民(民) (mín, "people") implies the national citizenry involved in aviation processes; 航(航) (háng, "navigation") focuses on flight and air travel. Together, 中國民航(中國民航) (Zhōngguó Mínháng) denotes China's organized air operations involving citizens — thus representing the Civil Aviation Administration of China.

examples.chinese: 中国民航(中國民航)是一个重要的机构。
examples.pinyin: Zhōngguó Mínháng shì yīgè zhòngyào de jīgòu.
examples.english: The Civil Aviation Administration of China is an important organization.

examples.chinese: 中国民航(中國民航)的航班准点率很高。
examples.pinyin: Zhōngguó Mínháng de hángbān zhǔndiǎn lǜ hěn gāo.
examples.english: The punctuality rate of flights by the Civil Aviation Administration of China is very high.

examples.chinese: 很多人关注中国民航(很多人關注中國民航)的最新政策。
examples.pinyin: Hěn duō rén guānzhù Zhōngguó Mínháng de zuìxīn zhèngcè.
examples.english: Many people are paying attention to the latest policies of the Civil Aviation Administration of China.
